scripts.build:polyfills: for p in polyfills/personal-graph polyfills/identity polyfills/graph-sync polyfills/shape-validation polyfills/governance; do (cd $p && pnpm build); done
scripts.build:demos: for d in demos/community-chat demos/p2p-vcs demos/collaborative-doc demos/collaborative-canvas demos/multiplayer-game; do (cd $d && pnpm build); done
